title: 👻Ghost Shader RP
description: This resource pack makes all players transparent and gray.
body:
This respack creates crafts from **all player ghosts**. All players become transparent, and the closer they are to the light, the more visible they are. Depending on the light level, they can be almost invisible. **All players also become black and white**.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16823351b090479c346f70f11e72676e4647e7b9.png)

This resource pack uses vanilla shaders, which **conflict with mods and versions like OptiFine and Iris**. Therefore, it can only be used with pure vanilla shaders.
